name: Schisandra Wuweizi Berries
description: An adaptogenic berry containing five distinct flavors. High concentration of lignans (schisandrins) acts as an astringent preventing chronic fluid depletion from watery diarrhea, protecting liver cells, and restoring pediatric energy reserves.
preparation: Astringent tea: Steep 5g of clean crushed dried berries in 300ml of hot water for 15 minutes. Strain and drink warm twice daily.
safetyAlert: Exceptionally well tolerated. Safe for long-term supportive therapy.
interactions: None reported. Safe to administer with standard clinical hydration.
